translation_text: Heaven and earth do not act from (the impulse of) any wish to be benevolent;
translation_text_raw: Heaven and earth do not act from (the impulse of) any wish to be benevolent;

translation_text: they deal with all things as the dogs of grass are dealt with.
translation_text_raw: they deal with all things as the dogs of grass are dealt with.

translation_text: The sages do not act from (any wish to be) benevolent;
translation_text_raw: The sages do not act from (any wish to be) benevolent;

translation_text: they deal with the people as the dogs of grass are dealt with.
translation_text_raw: they deal with the people as the dogs of grass are dealt with.

translation_text: May not the space between heaven and earth be compared to a bellows?
translation_text_raw: May not the space between heaven and earth be compared to a bellows?

translation_text: 'Tis emptied, yet it loses not its power;
translation_text_raw: 'Tis emptied, yet it loses not its power;

translation_text: 'Tis moved again, and sends forth air the more.
translation_text_raw: 'Tis moved again, and sends forth air the more.

translation_text: Much speech to swift exhaustion lead we see;
translation_text_raw: Much speech to swift exhaustion lead we see;

translation_text: Your inner being guard, and keep it free.
translation_text_raw: Your inner being guard, and keep it free.
